d: Harak launches a vicious assault, striking an enemy [[10]] times, each dealing [[60%]]<ATK> damage. Each strike also deals extra damage equal to [[6%]] of the enemy's lost HP, up to [[120%]] of Harak's own ATK. The final strike deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage and knocks the enemy down. While casting this skill, Harak remains [[unaffected|uncontrol]] and prevents the enemy from recovering HP for [[6]]s, causing them to lose [[40%]]<ATK> HP per second.
Increases the damage of each successive strike to [[70%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each successive strike to [[80%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each successive strike to [[90%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of each successive strike to [[100%]]<ATK>, and the final strike to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Harak dives beneath the surface, swiftly reaching the [[weakest|weakest]] enemy, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage and knocking them 1 tile back. While underwater, Harak is [[invincible|invincible]], and each assist or defeat resets Tidal Assault's cooldown.
Increases the damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[250%]]<ATK>.

Passive. Harak enters feast mode when a battle starts, increasing Crit by [[35]] and Haste by [[50]] for [[12]]s. Assisting or defeating a unit resets the duration of feast mode.
Upon exiting feast mode, Harak loses control and indiscriminately devours the [[weakest|weakest]] non-summoned unit, whether ally or enemy, instantly defeating them. During this time, he is [[unaffected|uncontrol]]. Harak cannot devour an enemy whose HP exceeds [[200%]]<ATK> of his own ATK. In Boss fights, if attempting to devour an ally, Harak prioritizes devouring the unit positioned closest to the front at the start of the battle.
Increases Crit granted by feast mode to [[40]].
Increases Crit granted by feast mode to [[45]].
Increases Crit granted by feast mode to [[50]].
Harak increases Life Drain by [[8]] during battle. Each time he assists or defeats a unit, he gains an extra [[1]] Life Drain, up to a maximum of [[4]].
Harak increases Life Drain by [[10]] during battle. Each time he assists or defeats a unit, he gains an extra [[2]] Life Drain, up to a maximum of [[8]].
Harak increases Life Drain by [[12]] during battle. Each time he assists or defeats a unit, he gains an extra [[3]] Life Drain, up to a maximum of [[12]].
Upon assisting or defeating a unit, Harak gains [[60%]] of their ATK and [[60%]] of their max HP, up to [[220%]] of his base ATK and [[220%]] of his base max HP.
Gains up to [[240%]] of his base ATK and [[240%]] of his base max HP.
Gains up to [[260%]] of his base ATK and [[260%]] of his base max HP.
Recovers HP when assisting or defeating a unit, with the recovery amount equal to [[50%]] of the defeated unit's max HP.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 DEF Penetration, 25 Crit DMG Boost.

d: Upon assisting or defeating [[2]] units, Harak recovers [[700]] Energy from casting Vicious Bite.
